name: Sesame Ginger Barbecued Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3/8 cup plum sauce or sweet and sour sauce
1 teaspoon grated fresh ginger or 1/4 teaspoon ground ginger
1/4 to 1/2 teaspoon Oriental chili sauce or several dashes bottled hot pepper sauce
6 small skinless, boneless chicken breast halves and/or thighs (about 1 1/2 pounds total)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine all sauce ingredients except the chicken. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring frequently. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 3 minutes. Set aside.
2. Rinse chicken pieces; pat dry thoroughly.
3. Grill chicken on lightly greased rack of an uncovered grill directly over medium heat for 12 to 15 minutes or until no longer pink and tender, turning once and brushing with sauce during the last 5 minutes.
4. Heat remaining sauce in a small saucepan until bubbly. Serve alongside grilled chicken.
Serves 6
Nutritional information: 166 calories per serving, 4g total fat, 1g saturated fat, 59mg cholesterol, 216mg sodium, 9g carbohydrates, 0g fiber, 22g protein, 1% vitamin A, 1% vitamin C, 1% calcium, and 5% iron.
